docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, JAY A. AS TO DEFENDANT POMPEI, PENNY AKA KERRY, PENNEY EXECUTREK DBA UNIGLOBE EXECUTREK TRAVEL INC. TRIAL RESET TO OCT-06-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF SEP-10-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POMPEI, PENNY AKA KERRY, PENNEY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, JAY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXECUTREK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,063.00, EVIDENCE DID NOT SUSTAIN BURDEN BY PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE THAT CORPORATE VEIL SHOULD BE PIERCED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
